novel_features.name: Cross-Meeting Commitment Tracker
novel_features.description: See every open action item you promised across all calls — grouped by meeting, assignee, and date — without opening a single recording.

novel_features.name: Topic Frequency Tracker
novel_features.description: Find out how often 'pricing,' 'onboarding,' or any keyword has surfaced in your meetings over the past N weeks — with week-over-week trend.

novel_features.name: Pre-Call Account Brief
novel_features.description: Get a chronological history of every meeting with a specific person or company — past topics, open action items, last contact date — before you join a call.

novel_features.name: Engagement Velocity Tracker
novel_features.description: Track whether your meeting cadence with a key account is accelerating, stable, or stalling — month by month.

novel_features.name: Team Meeting Workload
novel_features.description: See which team members are spending the most hours in meetings per week and whether the load is worsening.

novel_features.name: Account Relationship History
novel_features.description: View a complete, domain-keyed history with any company: every meeting, topics discussed, action items, and cadence — in one structured output.

novel_features.name: Stale Recording Detector
novel_features.description: Find recordings that were captured but have no transcript, summary, or action items synced — useful for operators debugging pipeline gaps.

novel_features.name: CRM Gap Audit
novel_features.description: Surface CRM-matched meetings where no action items were logged — calls that touched active deals but left no paper trail.

novel_features.name: Recording Coverage Report
novel_features.description: Track how reliably a recurring meeting (weekly planning, standup, 1:1) is being recorded over time.
